title: Baked Potato
description: Classic oven-baked russet potatoes with crispy skin and fluffy interior, loaded with your favorite toppings.

ingredients.item: cooked bacon bits or crumbled bacon
steamed broccoli florets or warmed chili

steps.instruction: Scrub potatoes well. Pat dry with a paper towel.
Rub each potato all over with olive oil. Season generously with coarse salt.
Pierce each potato 6–8 times with a fork to allow steam to escape.
Place directly on the oven rack (or on a baking sheet). Bake for 50–60 minutes until a fork slides easily into the center with no resistance.
Remove from oven. Cut a deep cross into the top of each potato and squeeze the ends toward the center to open up and fluff the interior.
Add a pat of butter immediately so it melts into the hot potato.
Top with desired toppings — sour cream, cheese, bacon, green onions, broccoli, and/or chili. Serve immediately while hot.

notes: Placing the potatoes directly on the oven rack instead of a baking sheet allows heat to circulate all around for a crispier skin.
